raw_responses.title: Decoupling Safety into Orthogonal Subspace (2025/10)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: LoRA decouples safety into low-rank subspace orthogonal to model's intrinsic transformation; safety doesn't interfere with capabilities.
